rationale: Both ensures `forall|ki|` quantifiers share the `KeyIterator::between(lo, ki, hi)` trigger but are split across `post1_self_@` and `post2_self_@`, so z3 never aligns the two runs at a common iterator. Re-asserting each run's forall forces its trigger to fire, then `assert forall |k: K| ...` lifts `k` to `KeyIterator::new_spec(k)` and case-splits on `between`, pinning both views to the same value pointwise. `valid_implies_complete` makes both domains full so that `=~=` lifts pointwise equality to whole-view equality.
